note: One entry per distinct numeric source value used in or spec'd for the dashboard UI. See docs/architecture/DENOMINATORS_AUDIT.md for claim-level tracing.

denominators.scope_description: Unique incidents in the RAG v2 corpus, which is also the M003 cascade model training set. Used as denominator in Narrative Hero 'X of 156 comparable incidents'.
denominators.regeneration_note: python scripts/build_rag_v2.py rebuilds corpus from cascading 156-incident set

denominators.scope_description: Barrier-level documents in the RAG v2 corpus. Spec'd for provenance strip Line 2 ('1,161 barriers') but not yet rendered in any frontend component.

Unique incidents in the M002 LOC-scoped training set (feature_matrix.parquet, XGBoost/LogReg non-cascade models). Used in DashboardView 'Reference incidents' KPI and Assessment Basis block. Incorrectly reused in DriversHF Apriori description (actual Apriori source has 723 incidents).
denominators.regeneration_note: python -m src.modeling.feature_engineering regenerates feature_matrix.parquet from controls_combined.csv

denominators.scope_description: LOC-scoped barrier rows in M002 training set (one row per barrier observation). Used in DashboardView 'Barrier observations' KPI and Assessment Basis block.

Pair-feature rows (one row per conditioning+target barrier pair) used to train the M003 cascade XGBoost model. Spec'd for provenance strip Line 1. The pair-feature matrix itself was ephemeral — not saved to disk. Current cascading_training.parquet has 530 single-barrier rows (different granularity). The base input CSV (data/models/cascading_input/barrier_model_dataset_base_v3.csv) has 552 rows.
denominators.regeneration_note: pair_builder.py must be re-run to regenerate; will not produce 813 rows from current 552-row base CSV — model was trained on an earlier snapshot

denominators.scope_description: Current single-barrier rows in cascading_training.parquet. 156 unique incidents. Same incident set as RAG corpus. Different from 813 (pair-feature rows) — different granularity, different snapshot.
denominators.regeneration_note: data_prep.py in src/modeling/cascading/ regenerates from cascading_input CSV

denominators.scope_description: Number of incidents analysed to produce the Apriori co-failure rules. This is the value that should appear in the Apriori table description in DriversHF.tsx, not 174. The 174 currently in the UI is wrong for this context.
denominators.regeneration_note: Apriori rules were generated by scripts/association_mining/ chain. Re-running requires the full aggregated incident data. Script existence confirmed but runability on current data not verified.

denominators.scope_description: Number of Apriori co-failure rules loaded by the /apriori-rules API endpoint. Rendered as table rows in DriversHF AprioriRulesTable. No static UI claim — value comes from API at runtime.
Total canonical V2.3 JSON files in the structured incidents directory. Not shown in the dashboard UI. Referenced in CLAUDE.md session checkpoint.
denominators.regeneration_note: Output of full pipeline acquire+extract+convert-schema chain

denominators.scope_description: Mean 5-fold CV AUC for the M003 cascade XGBoost model. Spec'd for provenance strip Line 1 ('AUC 0.76 ± 0.07'). Not yet rendered in any frontend component.
denominators.regeneration_note: Retraining will change this value; current value is from the training run that produced the committed pipeline.joblib

denominators.scope_description: Std dev of 5-fold CV AUC for M003 cascade model. Spec'd for provenance strip Line 1 ('0.76 ± 0.07'). Not yet rendered.
